CONTENT.Honours: IndividualSerie A Goal of the Month: December 2023
CONTENT.Club career: Ngonge is a youth exponent from Club Brugge. He made his senior debut on 2 December 2018 in the Belgian Pro League against Standard Liège. He replaced Emmanuel Dennis after 20 minutes.On 1 September 2019, Ngonge was loaned out to Jong PSV for the 2019–20 season.After his return, he was directly sold to Dutch Eredivisie club RKC Waalwijk. There, he developed into a starter in his first season and scored his first goal for the club in his fourth game, a 2–2 draw against Feyenoord.On 19 January 2023, Ngonge joined Italian Serie A club Hellas Verona.Ngonge signed for fellow Italian club Napoli on 19 January 2024.
CONTENT.Personal life: Ngonge's father, Michel Ngonge, was also a professional footballer and represented the DR Congo national team.
CONTENT.External links: Cyril Ngonge at the Royal Belgian Football AssociationCareer stats & Profile - Voetbal International

SUMMARY: Cyril Ngonge (born 26 May 2000) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays for Serie A club Napoli as an attacking midfielder, winger, or forward.
